ValidationRule.description: Once Payment is Reversed do not allow payment to be updated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser,OR(AND( ISCHANGED( Payment_Reversed__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "NSF"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Stopped"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Unauthorised"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Stale Dated"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Payment posted to Incorrect account"))), AND( OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate )), NOT(ISCHANGED(Payment_Reversed__c)), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "NSF"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Stopped"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Unauthorised"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Stale Dated"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Payment_Reversed__c) , "Payment posted to Incorrect account"))) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Once the Payment is reversed, it cannot be updated
